sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109283" key="u(posurmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσυρμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n109283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purging,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
